Adventurer Challenge
Secret Lamp Artifact

Triggers: 3 sec

Ancient Meteorite
Ancient meteorites fall on 3 random enemies. Targets and all enemies in a small radius around them take 150000 magic damage every second for 3 sec. This damage ignores all shields and damage-reducing effects. Also, whenever an enemy takes damage from this ability, it has a 30% chance to turn to stone for 3 sec. During this time, the target cannot move and takes 35% more damage.

Requirements: 90-100
